titleStmt.title: SII 24.227: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 227. (A.R. No. 20 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a further gift of 20 mā of tax-free land by the king to the same bhaṭṭas. This record engraved in continuation of the previous inscription (No. 226) is dated in the 12th year and 102nd day of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakra[vatti] koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nām nam perāl vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāmac caturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku taṅkaḷukku Alakaṟai nāṭ ṭilp pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum pattāvatum patiṉoṉṟāvatum viṭṭa nilamum nattaṅkaḷum niṅkalāka paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu kār mutalukku Ala
kaṟai kiḻvayalil nāṭṭup potu koṇṭik kūttaṉ nilam Oṉpatu māvum cūriyateva nallūrk kaṭṭaḷai pavittiramāṇikkavatikku meṟkku ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻa vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟup paṭṭappāḻ nilam nālumāvum pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum taricu nilattilum maṉai nilat tūrvai kāṭu pāḻilum taṅkaḷukku Ām Eṉṟa nilattile Ēḻumā nilamum Āka nilam Irupatu māvum toṭ ṭiyattil Ālaṅkaḷamum Alakaṟaiyil kāṭṭukkaḷamum śrī māheśvara nallūril kiḻaikkaḷamum Āka Ikkaḷaṅkaḷum nilamum taṅkaḷukku bhūdāna Iṟaiyili Āka tantu Ivaiyiṟṟāl varum nelk kaṭa
mai kācu kaṭamai poṉvari kāṇikkai kāttikaip paccai vācal viṉiyokam pañcu pili cantu vikkirakap peṟu taṟi Iṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārap pāṭṭam pāci pāṭṭam Oḻukkunir miṉpāṭṭam Āṉaic cālai kutiraip panti Ērivari yiṉavari Iṭai vari nirāṇi maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Upātikaḷum Uṭpaṭa paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu kār mutalukku bhūdāna Iṟaiyiliyāka tantu variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻippatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Innilamum kaḷaṅkaḷum kaikkoṇṭu candrādityavaṟ cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉubhavi
ttup potuka § Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu § yāṇṭu 10 2 nāḷ 100 2 § Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
